entities.name: POD FLY

entities.name: POD WASP
entities.description: Tanaostigmodes cajaninae La Salle, a pest that constrains pigeonpea production

entities.description: Ability of the plant to resist pests, used as a management component

entities.description: Wild relative of pigeonpea showing resistance to pod fly

entities.description: Wild relative of pigeonpea showing resistance to pod fly and pod wasp

entities.description: Wild relative of pigeonpea susceptible to pod fly

entities.description: Wild relative of pigeonpea susceptible to pod fly
